2 New Upcoming Surge Events

The next TWO Surge Events are coming to Escape Velocity this week!   

14x Silver Loot:
 Tuesday, May 30 - Thursday, June 1

150x Platinum Loot:

 12pm EDT Wednesday

Don't miss out on these opportunities to increase your chances of discovering some valuable Star Atlas loot! Good luck!
